post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers members of city/county/district fire departments (volunteer, partly paid, fully paid), Department of Forestry and Fire Protection active firefighting members, county forestry/firefighting departments, and warden service of Wildlife Protection Branch. Also covers sheriff's offices, California Highway Patrol, DA investigator staff, and police departments for hernia (not mapped here). Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026. Disease must develop or manifest during service.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers members of sheriff's offices, police departments, California Highway Patrol, DA investigator staff, and warden service of Wildlife Protection Branch. Heart trouble and pneumonia only (hernia also included for these groups but is 'other' category). Must develop or manifest during service.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Hernia must develop or manifest during service. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers sheriff's offices, police, CHP, DA investigators. Regular salaried county/city-county peace officers also covered for hernia manifesting during service.

condition_specific: Cancer including leukemia caused by exposure to known IARC carcinogen
statute_citation: Cal. Lab. Code § 3212.1 (William Dallas Jones Cancer Presumption Act of 2010)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 120 months
notes: Covers active firefighting members (volunteer, partly paid, fully paid) of city/county/district/state fire departments, UC/CSU, Cal Fire, county forestry; also peace officers (§830.1, §830.2(a), §830.37(a)(b)) primarily in active law enforcement; fire and rescue services coordinators at Cal OES. Member must demonstrate exposure to known IARC carcinogen. Rebuttable if carcinogen not reasonably linked to disabling cancer and primary site established. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026. Post-termination max is 120 months (10 years) — longer than most other CA presumptions.

condition_specific: Cancer including leukemia caused by exposure to known IARC carcinogen
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 120 months
notes: Volunteer firefighters explicitly included in § 3212.1(a)(1) definition of covered active firefighting members.

condition_specific: Cancer including leukemia caused by exposure to known IARC carcinogen
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 120 months
notes: Peace officers defined in § 830.1, § 830.2(a), § 830.37(a)(b) primarily engaged in active law enforcement. Also covered under Government Code § 31720.6 (safety members with 5+ years service, county pension systems).

condition_specific: Blood-borne infectious disease; MRSA skin infection
post_termination_formula: Blood-borne: 3 months per year, max 60 months; MRSA: flat 90 days
notes: Covers sheriff's offices, police/fire departments, Cal Fire active firefighting members, county forestry, Penal Code Chapter 4.5 individuals. Blood-borne infectious disease: post-termination window is 3 months/year, max 60 months. MRSA skin infection: separate flat 90-day post-termination window. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026 (§ SEC. 5 / § 3212.8(e)).

condition_specific: Blood-borne infectious disease; MRSA skin infection
post_termination_formula: Blood-borne: 3 months per year, max 60 months; MRSA: flat 90 days
notes: Volunteer fire department members covered ('whether those persons are volunteer, partly paid, or fully paid').

condition_specific: Blood-borne infectious disease; MRSA skin infection
post_termination_formula: Blood-borne: 3 months per year, max 60 months; MRSA: flat 90 days
notes: Covers sheriff's offices, police departments, Penal Code Chapter 4.5 individuals. Also covered under Government Code § 31720.7 (county pension system members including probation officers).

condition_specific: Post-traumatic stress or mental health disorder (PTSD or mental health condition diagnosed under this division)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Sunset provision: section repealed January 1, 2029 (per § 3212.15(g)). Applies to injuries occurring on or after January 1, 2020. Covers same firefighter population as § 3212.1 plus peace officers (§ 830.1, §830.2(a)(b)(c), §830.32, §830.37(a)(b), §830.5, §830.55) and Cal OES fire/rescue coordinators. Government Code § 31720.91 provides parallel disability retirement presumption (county pension systems) — repealed January 1, 2032 per SB 623 extension.

condition_specific: Post-traumatic stress or mental health disorder (PTSD or mental health condition diagnosed under this division)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Volunteer firefighters explicitly included (active firefighting members, 'whether volunteers, partly paid, or fully paid'). Sunset: repealed January 1, 2029.

condition_specific: Post-traumatic stress or mental health disorder (PTSD or mental health condition diagnosed under this division)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Peace officers defined in Penal Code §§ 830.1, 830.2(a)(b)(c), 830.32, 830.37(a)(b), 830.5, 830.55 primarily in active law enforcement. Sunset: repealed January 1, 2029.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers regular fully-paid fire department members plus active Cal Fire firefighting members. Employer may require pre-employment TB test. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026. Government Code § 31720.92 provides parallel disability retirement presumption (county pension systems).

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers full-time salaried police, sheriff, CHP, DA investigators, and prison/jail guards and correctional officers employed by a public agency. Government Code § 31720.92 provides parallel disability retirement presumption (county pension systems).

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Prison or jail guards and correctional officers employed by a public agency are explicitly covered under § 3212.6.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers regular full-time salaried fire department members and county forestry/firefighting. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026. Government Code § 31720.93 provides parallel disability retirement presumption.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers regular full-time salaried police, sheriff, CHP, county probation officers, DA investigators. Government Code § 31720.93 provides parallel disability retirement presumption.

condition_specific: Illness or death due to exposure to biochemical substance (chemical warfare agent, weaponized biological agent, nuclear or radiological agent)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Covers peace officers (§§ 830.1-830.5) and members of fire departments including volunteers, partly paid, fully paid, Cal Fire, county forestry. Extended to DoD/NASA/FAA airport fire departments for injuries on or after January 1, 2026. Government Code § 31720.9 provides parallel disability retirement presumption.

condition_specific: Illness or death due to exposure to biochemical substance (chemical warfare agent, weaponized biological agent, nuclear or radiological agent)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Volunteers explicitly included in 'members of a fire department' definition under § 3212.85(e)(2).

condition_specific: Illness or death due to exposure to biochemical substance (chemical warfare agent, weaponized biological agent, nuclear or radiological agent)
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Peace officers under Penal Code §§ 830.1-830.5. Government Code § 31720.9 provides parallel disability retirement presumption for county pension system peace officer and firefighter members.

statute_citation: Cal. Gov. Code § 7523 (COVID-19 Disability Retirement Presumption)
notes: Expired: § 7523.2 repealed this article effective January 1, 2024. Covered public retirement system members in firefighter and peace officer job classifications under § 3212.87. Rebuttable presumption of service-related disability for COVID-19-related disability retirement.

statute_citation: Cal. Gov. Code § 7523 (COVID-19 Disability Retirement Presumption)
notes: Expired: § 7523.2 repealed this article effective January 1, 2024. Covered public retirement system members in peace officer job classifications under § 3212.87.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: County pension system (Chapter 4 / Chapter 5 systems). Requires 5 years service. Covers safety members, firefighter members (including active fire suppression members not classified as safety members), and members in active law enforcement. Disease not attributed to pre-existing condition. Rebuttable.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: County pension system. 5 years service required. Covers members in active law enforcement.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per full year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: County pension system disability retirement presumption. Member must have been employed full-time for at least 5 consecutive months in a calendar year in the listed classification AND required to wear a duty belt as a condition of employment.
